purpose: Uniform adapter result schema for filtering value/gradient benchmark cells.  This is a representation contract only; adapter payloads do not prove filter accuracy.

implementation_boundary.dpf_import_boundary: experiments.dpf_implementation may provide benchmark adapters without promotion to the bayesfilter.highdim public API
implementation_boundary.historical_rows: historical algorithms may be represented only with historical-only statuses and must not be current evidence

field_contract.algorithm_id: Stable adapter id, for example kalman_exact, cut4, zhao_cui_tt, bootstrap_dpf_current, or ledh_pfpf_alg1_ukf_current.
field_contract.target_id: Stable target id or registry row id namespace for the model target.
field_contract.registry_row_id: A row id from the P1 target registry; historical rows still point to the target row they were run against.
field_contract.dimension: Integer state dimension or active dimension for panel rows.
field_contract.horizon: Number of observations in the fixed row.
field_contract.theta_id: Stable id for the frozen theta payload.
field_contract.theta_dimension: Integer gradient coordinate count for the row.
field_contract.observation_id: Stable id for the frozen observation payload.
field_contract.value: Scalar number only when value_status is VALID; otherwise null.
field_contract.gradient: List with length theta_dimension only when gradient_status is VALID; otherwise null.
field_contract.reference_type: One value from reference_type_vocabulary, inherited from the target registry row.
field_contract.reason_codes: List of reason-code vocabulary entries; use ['NONE'] only when no exception/status reason applies.
field_contract.diagnostics: JSON object carrying common diagnostics and algorithm-specific nested diagnostics without changing top-level shape.
field_contract.runtime_seconds: Nonnegative number for executed cells; null only for historical-only or blocked-only payloads.
field_contract.random_seed: Integer seed, string deterministic seed, or null for deterministic no-seed rows.
field_contract.artifact_path: Durable path for the producing artifact or P2 fixture artifact.

status_consistency_rules: value_status other than VALID requires value null.
gradient_status VALID requires gradient length equal to theta_dimension.
gradient_status other than VALID requires gradient null.
theta_dimension 0 requires gradient_status NO_THETA_GRADIENT_DIM0 or BLOCKED_VALUE_ROUTE when the value route is blocked.
evidence_role historical_only requires value_status and gradient_status HISTORICAL_ONLY_NOT_EVIDENCE.
evidence_role blocked_only requires value_status BLOCKED_VALUE_ROUTE or NOT_RUN.
reason_codes must be drawn from reason_code_vocabulary.
nonclaims: no public API promotion for experimental DPF code
